name: Nad Al Sheba, Dubai, United Arab Emirates (25.11991  - Google
Nad Al Sheba Cycle Loop - Komoot
snippet: The Nad Al Sheba Cycle Loop is a converted camel track. It consists of three loops of varying distances from 4km to 8km. Dirkster. February 18, 2023.

name: Nad Al Sheba cycling track / NAS / Meydan, Dubai, UAE Trail - Wikiloc
snippet: It is an amazing cycling track in Nad Al Sheba next to Dubai Downtown and Business bay. You will cycle along Meydan bridge, Mohammed Bin Rashid Al Maktoum city.
